name: Skillet Turkey with Rice and Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Turkey tenderloins, cut into 1-inch pieces
5 5/16 oz Pkg rice and pasta mix with oriental seasonings
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a large nonstick skillet with nonstick cooking spray. Heat over medium-high heat until hot. Add turkey; cook and stir until browned. Remove turkey from skillet; cover to keep warm.
2. Melt margarine in the same skillet. Add rice and pasta from the package; cook and stir 2 to 3 minutes or until light golden brown.
3. Add water, seasoning packet from rice and pasta mix, ground red pepper, and turkey. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low; cover and cook 15 minutes.
4. Add frozen vegetables; cover and cook 10 minutes. Uncover and add red bell pepper; cook an additional 5 minutes or until turkey is no longer pink and liquid is absorbed, stirring occasionally.
